reviews.review_msg: tests were pretty much just like practice as a matter of fact a question on one of the practices I prayed wouldn't be on final magically appeared on the final. classes are pretty standard but she walks around to answer questions and check up on progress which was very cool

Very nice and caring professor. All assignments, quizzes, and tests were very fair and resembled homework problems. Lectures were clear and straighforward but there were times I wished she explained concepts a little better.

She was a good prof and helpful in office hours. She welcomed questions. Her lectures were a bit rushed but explained the concepts clearly. Provided a lot of practice exam material, however, I would say the exams were harder than the practice

Explains concepts very clearly and has good notes to learn from. Dr. Tan was also very patient and kind. One downfall was the pace of the lectures, as I feel like they were rushed. Exams and quizzes were easy, as they were questions similar to the homework and practice questions.

Sheena is super helpful and kind if you reach out to her. I found the lecture notes and the tests to be different, but if you do all the practice and use all the resources provided you'll be fine. If there is another section for this class at the same time, the tests, quizzes, and assignments are the same.
Her notes are very nice and clean but sometimes she does go a bit quick
A lot of the lectures seemed rushed

Sheena is the BEST prof I have had, she is dedicated to her student's. She often stays an hour or two even later than her office hours to make sure her student's are ready. She is very patient and encouraging and makes you want to learn so you don't disappoint her or yourself! You'll feel more motivated to do well if you take her course.

Very approachable and easy going. Don't be afraid to ask questions in class, Dr. Tan will help answer the questions with clear explanations. Tests are very fair and related to lectures and practice with a few questions on the harder side, which helps challenge the students. To prepare us well for exams, she posts a lot of helpful materials online.

(FANX99, not EDUC211) Sheena was great! I initially didn't think I could pass the class at all because I'm that bad at math. But she is very caring, and genuinely wants you to do well. Don't be afraid to ask questions or for clarification, she won't get mad or impatient - she'll keep explaining until you understand. I'd recommend her 100%!!

I had her as my Fanx99 prof and she was really nice, and went out of her way to help and make her self accessible. You can tell she really cares about her students. I would take fanx99 with her if you can.

Sheena is one of the only profs at SFU in my experience that cared how you did in the class. If you show up, try, and reach out if things are uncertain then there is no reason for you to not succeed in the class. Would recommend for anyone, even someone who is not going into education.

Sheena was great and I really enjoyed this class. Many had the impression of it being a GPA booster and were disappointed. If you put in the effort to understand and do the work, you will do well because you earned it, not simply because it is an education class. Sheena cares about students and is absolutely fair.
